sources_searched: websearch (Google, OpenAI, Apple, Disney, Sony, Waymo, Anthropic, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Netflix, exec boards, ATS boards)

career_monitor.notes: 0 new exec engineering roles across all 10 monitored companies

jsearch.notes: LA returned 10 results; London, Singapore (timeout), Tokyo all returned 0. LA dominated by small startups, banking titles, and wrong domains.

adzuna.notes: London: 15 results, all banking VP titles (Citi, Jefferies, Robert Walters) or irrelevant (junior roles, SDRs). Singapore: 15 results, mostly BD/sales roles.

mycareersfuture.notes: CTO query: 15 results, all previously seen or filtered (comp too low, wrong domain, Web3). VP Engineering query: 3 results, all filtered.

websearch.notes: Google: VP Photos (can't verify JS-rendered), VP Security (out of scope), VP Finance/Compliance (out of scope), VP Cloud (infra-focused). Disney: only Addressable Ads VP (already rejected). Sony: VP Software Dev (404/closed). Waymo: Director DevAI (confirmed CLOSED). OpenAI/Anthropic/Apple/Microsoft/Netflix/LinkedIn: no new qualifying eng leadership roles.

pre_filter_candidates.title: VP of Engineering - AI Platform & Scale Leader
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: B2B surplus inventory marketplace, not AI platform. Series C ~$40M. Likely <200 employees. Player-coach language in description.

pre_filter_candidates.title: VP Product Engineering
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Comp far below $350K threshold. Also described as 'senior individual contributor' — not leadership.

pre_filter_candidates.title: VP of Engineering
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Recruiter aggregator listing, no company identified. Cannot verify company size or comp.

pre_filter_candidates.title: VP, Engineering (Core Services, Data, & AI/ML)
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Role posted November 2022 (3+ years stale). Almost certainly filled.

pre_filter_candidates.title: Chief Technology Officer
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Duplicate from prior run. Company identity hidden behind recruiter. GPU infra focus may be too infrastructure-specific.

pre_filter_candidates.title: VP Domain Leader
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Comp below £160K threshold. 'VP Domain Leader' is an unusual title — may be equivalent to Senior Manager.

pre_filter_candidates.title: Head of Engineering, Search / AI
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Reports to EVP of Engineering. Likely Senior Director equivalent, not VP-level. Financial data analytics domain is adjacent but not core. Could not verify posting details or freshness.

pre_filter_candidates.title: Vice President, Software Development - Global
pre_filter_candidates.filter_reason: Returns 404 — likely closed/filled. Role focused on OS and SDKs (systems/firmware), which is out of scope per learned preferences.

notes: Seventh consecutive day with extremely thin market for publicly posted exec engineering roles at this level. All API sources and WebSearch exhausted with zero qualifying results.
